logic.Id3: OR(AND(NOT(Scl), NOT(Pu1), NOT(Lyl1), prog_ass_Eprot, NOT(NTC), Stat5), AND(NOT(Scl), NOT(Pu1), Lyl1, prog_ass_Eprot, NOT(NTC)), AND(NOT(Scl), EQ(Pu1, 2), NOT(Lyl1), prog_ass_Eprot, NOT(NTC), Stat5), AND(NOT(Scl), EQ(Pu1, 2), Lyl1, prog_ass_Eprot, NOT(NTC)), AND(Scl, NOT(Pu1), prog_ass_Eprot, NOT(NTC)), AND(Scl, EQ(Pu1, 2), prog_ass_Eprot, NOT(NTC)))
